eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Medina, TX; at 2:11 AM on JUL 14, 2026 Effective until 2:11 AM JUL 15, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Heavy rains continue and from 7 to 9 inches of rain have already fallen north of Hondo, south of Tarpley, and near Quihi. Avoid travel if possible; especially roadways in these areas and near high water crossings. Monitor the National Weather Service (www.weather.gov) and local weather stations.
